case_title: ZHUOLUN LIAO VS. 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-08-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-08-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (3) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT 21 ST. CENTURY WAS REPRESENTED BY VICTOR LIU--CLAIMS REPRESENTATIVE; WHO WAIVES DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---REBECCA CHAU. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-08-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **FEE FOR SERVICE:$80.00** SERVED AUG-17-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MANZANO, ZENAIDA
RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT ERNESTO GUEVARRA

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-08-2015 AT 1:30 PM.
